title: Thresher triples damage to Mechanical targets

card.rawText: This creature inflicts 3x Atk damage to Mechanical-type creatures. Mechanical-type creatures normally unaffected by creature or magic effects are now affected. This supersedes their own creature effect.

plan.title: Thresher triples damage to Mechanical targets
plan.summary: Verify Thresher attack damage is tripled when it attacks a Mechanical-type creature.

notes: Use Test Mechanical Guardian as a high-HP Mechanical-type target with no creature effect.
This fixture covers the Mechanical damage multiplier, not the immunity override clause.

steps: Set Thresher as player_1 primary and Test Mechanical Guardian as player_2 primary.
manualVerification: Add a separate immunity-override fixture for Mechanical creatures whose own effect would normally block creature or magic effects.
riskNotes: The source card metadata still includes duplicate parsed effects for the same printed line; this fixture targets the multiplier effect 076-E02.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Thresher's Mechanical target attack damage multiplier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
